summary: Bug Fix Verification Complete - Both reported bugs are FIXED. 1) Horizontal scrolling for 'Kürzlich Beendet' carousel works correctly (scrollWidth: 2028px > clientWidth: 1264px, scrollLeft moves to 204px on scroll). 2) Gutschein filter now correctly uses product category instead of is_free_auction flag, showing 0 auctions as expected since no active auctions have voucher products. Translations 'Beendet' and 'Beendet am' display correctly on ended auction cards.

bug_1_horizontal_scroll.details: Horizontal scroll carousel for 'Kürzlich Beendet' works correctly. ScrollWidth (2028px) > ClientWidth (1264px). After scroll action, scrollLeft = 204px confirming scroll works.
bug_1_horizontal_scroll.location: Bottom of homepage when 'Live' filter is active

bug_2_voucher_filter.details: Gutschein filter now uses isVoucherProduct() helper that checks product.category for 'gutschein', 'voucher', or 'gift'. Shows 0 auctions correctly since no active auctions have voucher products.

translation_ended.details: 'Beendet' badge displays correctly on ended auction cards header

translation_ended_at.details: 'Beendet am' with date/time displays correctly at bottom of ended auction cards

alle_anzeigen_link.details: Clicking 'Alle anzeigen' correctly switches to 'Ende' filter (scale-105 class applied)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs reported are now fixed: 1) Horizontal scroll carousel for ended auctions works at bottom of homepage (only visible on 'Live' filter). 2) Gutschein filter uses product category (gutschein/voucher/gift) instead of is_free_auction flag. Currently shows 0 because no active auctions have voucher products - this is expected behavior. Translations 'Beendet' and 'Beendet am' work correctly on EndedAuctionCard component.
